title: Feature List
description: Schema for feature_list.json — tracks features and their tasks through the pipeline

retryCount.description: Per-feature retry counter (v3.1.0+). Reset to 0 when the feature passes, incremented when a task exhausts task-retries. Mirrors config.featureRetryCount for the currently-active feature.

definitionOfDone.description: Feature-level pass criteria (list). Gate checks all items present + non-placeholder before allowing passes:true. Mirrors acceptanceCriteria at task level and contract ## Verification Criteria at phase level.

producedByRole.description: Role that produced this feature's work. Used by the self-evaluation guard (validate refuses if currentRole === producedByRole).

retryCount.description: Per-task retry counter (tracked in config.taskRetryCount, mirrored here for history)

acceptanceCriteria.description: Task-level pass criteria (list). Gate checks all items present + non-placeholder before allowing status:complete. Mirrors definitionOfDone at feature level and contract ## Verification Criteria at phase level.

producedByRole.description: Role that produced this task's work. Used by the self-evaluation guard (validate refuses if currentRole === producedByRole).
